{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Gar
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gar]] has navy training.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gar]] analyzed a spell.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Only for a second,” Gar said, as he analyzed the spell.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
